title: trifolium dasyphyllum subsp. dasyphyllum
intro: Trifolium dasyphyllum subsp. dasyphyllum, also known as a sub-species of the Dasyphyllum Clover, is a perennial plant belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Trifolium dasyphyllum subsp. dasyphyllum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
